**TryHackMe: Regular Expressions Walkthrough**  
**Author:** Anonymousd  
   
 **Platform:** TryHackMe  
   
 **Date Completed:** March 23, 2026  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANUlEQVR4nO3OMQ2AABAAsSNBCUpfD6ZYGZDAgAU2QtIq6DIzW7UHAMBfHGt1V+fXEwAAXrseHCoGAe/SKtAAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)  
**Overview**  
This writeup summarizes my solutions for the **Regular Expressions Room** on TryHackMe.  
   
 The purpose is to practice **regex syntax, charsets, wildcards, metacharacters, and grouping**.  
I used [Regex101 to test all expressions.](https://regex101.com/ "https://regex101.com/")  
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANUlEQVR4nO3OYQ1AABSAwY9JoICqL4Z8Ikiggn9mu0twy8wc1RkAAH9xbdVa7V9PAAB47X4A9CgEJQFjJ/EAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)  
**Task 1 — Introduction**  
- Read the content provided in the room.  
- Practice exercises in Regex101.  
**Key Concept:**  
   
 Regular expressions allow **pattern matching in strings** — useful for  **data validation, text parsing, and cybersecurity tasks**.  
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANklEQVR4nO3OMQ2AABAAsSNhRAF6EPYDLhGADSywEZJWQZeZ2aszAAD+4l6rrTq+ngAA8Nr1AIWsBDYDm5cLAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC)  
**Task 2 — Charsets**  
**Q1:** Match characters c, o, g  
[cog]  
   
**Q2:** Match words: cat, fat, hat  
[cfg]at  
   
**Q3:** Match: Cat, cat, Hat, hat  
[CcHh]at  
   
**Q4:** Match filenames: File1 → file9  
[Ff]ile[1-9]  
   
**Q5:** Match all of above except File7  
[Ff]ile[^7]  
   
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANklEQVR4nO3OMQ2AABAAsSNBCUpfDq4wwIAABiywEZJWQZeZ2ao9AAD+4liruzq/ngAA8Nr1ABweBgdur/QFAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC)  
**Task 3 — Wildcards & Optional Characters**  
**Q1:** Match Cat, fat, hat, rat  
.at  
   
**Q2:** Match Cat and cats  
[Cc]ats?  
   
**Q3:** Match domain: cat.xyz  
cat\.xyz  
   
**Q4:** Match domains: cat.xyz, cats.xyz, hats.xyz  
[ch]ats?\.xyz  
   
**Q5:** Match 4-letter strings not ending with letters n-z  
...[^n-z]  
   
**Q6:** Match bat, bats, hat, hats but not rat or rats  
[^r]ats?  
   
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANklEQVR4nO3OQQmAABRAsSfYxZo/kSGMYQLPJrCCNxG2BFtmZquOAAD4i3Ot7mr/egIAwGvXA4qrBdGuSdJuAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC)  
**Task 4 — Metacharacters & Repetitions**  
**Q1:** Match catssss  
cats{4}  
   
**Q2:** Match Cat, cats, catsss using *  
[cC]ats*  
   
**Q3:** Match sentences: regex go br, regex go brrrrrr using +  
regex go br+  
   
**Q4:** Match filenames: ab0001, bb0000, abc1000, cba0110, c0000  
[abc]{1,3}[01]{4}  
   
**Q5:** Match filenames: File01, File2, file12, File20, File99  
[fF]ile\d{1,2}  
   
**Q6:** Match folder: kali tools  
kali\s+tools  
   
**Q7:** Match filenames: notes~, stuff@, gtfob#, lmaoo!  
\w{5}\W  
   
**Q8:** Match string in quotes using \S* and \s*  
\S*\s*\S*  
   
**Q9:** Match 9-character string not ending with !  
\S{8}[^!]  
   
**Q10:** Match filenames: .bash_rc, .unnecessarily_long_filename, note1  
\.?\w+  
   
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANUlEQVR4nO3OMQ2AABAAsSPBCj7fFjsymJHAjAU2QtIq6DIzW7UHAMBfnGt1V8fXEwAAXrsexNkF4H1/HJoAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)  
**Task 5 — Anchors, Groups & Either/Or**  
**Q1:** Match line starting with Password: followed by 10 chars excluding 0  
^Password:[^0]{10}  
   
**Q2:** Match line starting with username: (including space)  
^username:\s  
   
**Q3:** Match lines not starting with a digit  
^\D  
   
**Q4:** Match string EOF at end of line  
EOF\$$  
   
**Q5:** Match I use nano or I use vim  
I use (nano|vim)  
   
**Q6:** Match line starting with $ + digit + $ + non-whitespace  
^\$\d\$\S+  
   
**Q7:** Match any IPv4 address  
(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}  
   
**Q8:** Match emails while grouping username & domain (excluding TLD)  
(\w+)@(\w+)\.com  
   
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANklEQVR4nO3OQQmAABRAsSfYxZo/kSGMYQLPJrCCNxG2BFtmZquOAAD4i3Ot7mr/egIAwGvXA4qrBdGuSdJuAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC)  
**Notes & Best Practices**  
- Always test regex patterns in **Regex101**.  
- Use **character classes ** **[ ]**,  **anchors ** **^ $**,  **quantifiers ** *** + ? {}**, and  **grouping ** **( )** strategically.  
- Regex is powerful for **log analysis, web scraping, input validation, and security automation**.  
![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAnEAAAACCAYAAAA3pIp+AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAA7EAAAOxAGVKw4bAAAANUlEQVR4nO3OMQ2AABAAsSPBCUZfEnoYmFDBhAU2QtIq6DIzW7UHAMBfnGt1V8fXEwAAXrse/wcF74lXkIsAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)  
**Screenshots:**  
- Include screenshots for **Regex101 matches** in screenshots/ folder:  
 ![Regex Match Example](screenshots/regex1.png)
